title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Aloe vera essential oils contains bioactive constituents like aloin and aloe-emodin, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, a key issue in ulcerative colitis. Aloe vera essential oils also contain vitamins A, C, and E, as well as folic acid, which are essential for healthy gut function. The anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of aloe vera essential oils can help soothe and protect the lining of the colon, reduc...
